column1: No other country celebrates a National Day on 12th June.
Buses and trains operate as usual in most places on 12th June.
On 12th June, the Russian President gives a speech at midday.
There are only a few firework displays on 12th June.
Some people in other countries also celebrate Russia Day.
The dinner in 2012 helped make some people become better friends.
People celebrated Russia Day more in the past than they do now.
